series.description: 70% or more reduction in weight and size compared to previous D Series. Stability, high efficiency and innovative cost reduction.
SIP (Single Inline Package) type isolated DC-DC converters for industrial electrical equipment, electronic control devices, and telecommunications. Wide input range.

PCB On Board Mounting Type. 2:1 input voltage range, high efficiency, low weight, current/short protection, external on/off control, adjustable output voltage (+-10%), RoHS, isolation, low ripple noise.
2:1 input voltage range, high efficiency, compact/lightweight. Output overcurrent and short-circuit protection, external ON/OFF control, adjustable output +-10%.
4:1 Wide Input Range DC-DC converters with synchronous rectification, ceramic capacitors, wide operating temperature -40 to +85C.
High-power DC-DC converter with up to 93% efficiency, 6-sided noise shielding.
Non-isolated step-down DC-DC converters (POL). Adjustable output voltage 0.65V~5.5V. SIP package.
Non-isolated step-down DC-DC converters providing low-voltage, high-current output as POL solutions. Adjustable output 0.65V~5.5V.
Non-isolated step-down DC-DC converters. Highest current POL option at 15A. Adjustable output, thermal protection.
Compact, lightweight AC-DC converters. 75% smaller and 90% lighter than previous OFS Series. CB certified.

Budget-friendly open-frame AC-DC converters. 220V dedicated (AC 180-264V). 75% size/weight reduction vs NOF Series.
Ultra-compact AC-DC converter with core PWM control, feedback, and transformer. External component configuration. 10-year warranty.

On-board type AC-DC converters. Standby power under 0.1W, 115kHz switching frequency. CB certified.
